title: Vanilla PvP Bow
description: A vanilla-style PvP bow with Vanilla Tweaks and Real Arrow Tip compatibility.
body:
This resource pack adds colour indicators to the bow charging animation similar to PvP texture packs.

Has compatibility with [Real Arrow Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-arrow-tip) by default.

There is an [additional pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-pvp-bow/version/1.0) that provides compatibility with [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Flint Tipped Arrows.
